full_text:
Zhang Liang 張梁
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Liang (張梁). Yellow Scarves leader and Zhang Jue’s brother. Self-titled ‘Lord of Man’. Zhang Liang was affiliated with Yellow Scarves. Zhang Liang lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
